name: easy-summarizer-platform
task_description: Summarize each dataset row into one sentence in the same language as the input. Platform feeds each CSV row as outer_context (all columns except expected).

steps.title: Summarize paragraph
steps.aim: Produce exactly one concise sentence that captures the main idea of the source text
steps.stage_action: Read the paragraph in the context (field input). Reply with a single sentence summary in the same language as the input. No markdown, no quotes, no preamble.
steps.reasoning_questions: What is the core fact? How to express it in one short sentence?
